description: Employee's recorded hours per week fall below the minimum required for the elected plan
Employee's enrollment effective date precedes the end of the applicable waiting period
Employee record has no employmentStatus value; eligibility cannot be evaluated
Employee's jobClass value does not match any configured eligibility rule condition
Employee's work location falls under a state rule that conflicts with the group-level eligibility configuration
Enrolled dependent has reached or exceeded the age-26 cutoff and has not yet been removed from coverage
Two employee records share the same SSN or name/DOB combination
Employee record has no hireDate; waiting period and eligibility date cannot be calculated
